payload.title: E2E realtime tests: two clients converge live; offline/reconnect catch-up
payload.description: Against real Postgres: two RemoteSyncAgents on one hosted project - a write on client A appears on client B within ~1s with NO manual sync; kill B's connection, write on A, reconnect B => B catches up via the cursor; idempotence under concurrent writes from both; incremental-replay correctness vs. a full-replay oracle (identical boards). Plus a perf assertion that applying one new event does not re-read/replay the whole log.
